channel.title: Photo-Gallery with Frontity
channel.description:
Hi All
I did another Frontity-Site, this time it has been something a bit different. A few years back (I think around 8-10) I have created a wordpress site to show off my personal photo portfolio. And last week I did came across this project: https://github.com/xiaolin/react-image-gallery
So, I thought using the react-image-gallery with Frontity, to display the images in the gallery based on the uploaded images of a wordpress site.
**Live-Site**: https://photo.dossis.ch/
![Unbenannt.PNG|576x500, 75%](upload://aX7ZlgPu3FFlMkVgMxXK5otKBOk.jpeg)
Potential Improvements:
* Currently the category is still hardcoded in the handler, maybe move this to the configurations * Allow multiple "galleries", per Category Links
**Plugins needed**: https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-media-library-categories/ to be able to add categories to images
If anyone is interested I can share the package :slight_smile:

item.title: Photo-Gallery with Frontity
item.dc:creator: marc
item.description:
I’m interested in seeing the package as well!

Read full topic

item.title: Photo-Gallery with Frontity
item.dc:creator: davidm.me
item.description:
Hi phn, Thinking of doing a gallery site for a friends paintings, this is my first time with Frontity - so be interested to see the package.
Thanks

Read full topic

item.title: Photo-Gallery with Frontity
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Really cool use case Happy to see Frontity being used beyond blogs!

Thanks for sharing @phn

Read full topic

item.title: Photo-Gallery with Frontity
item.dc:creator: phn
item.description:
Hi All

I did another Frontity-Site, this time it has been something a bit different. A few years back (I think around 8-10) I have created a wordpress site to show off my personal photo portfolio. And last week I did came across this project: https://github.com/xiaolin/react-image-gallery

So, I thought using the react-image-gallery with Frontity, to display the images in the gallery based on the uploaded images of a wordpress site.

Live-Site: https://photo.dossis.ch/

Potential Improvements:

  • Currently the category is still hardcoded in the handler, maybe move this to the configurations
  • Allow multiple “galleries”, per Category Links

Plugins needed: https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-media-library-categories/ to be able to add categories to images

If anyone is interested I can share the package

Read full topic
